queries.question: Give me the travel agencies and the corresponding service prices.
queries.sql: select travel_agency.name , service.price from Travel_Agency_Service join Service on Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID = Service.ServiceID join Travel_Agency on Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID = Travel_Agency.AgencyID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?price WHERE {
  ?travel_agency_service a :Travel_Agency_Service .
  ?service a :Service .
  ?travel_agency_service p:hasService ?service .
  ?travel_agency a :Travel_Agency .
  ?travel_agency_service p:hasTravel_Agency ?travel_agency .
  ?travel_agency p:name ?name .
  ?service p:Price ?price .
}

queries.question: Give me the service prices for each travel agency.
queries.sql: SELECT Service.Price  from Travel_Agency_Service join Service on Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID = Service.ServiceID join Travel_Agency on Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID = Travel_Agency.AgencyID   GROUP BY Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Travel_Agency)

queries.question: Show me the services that every travel agent has.
queries.sql: SELECT Service.Description  from Travel_Agency_Service join Service on Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID = Service.ServiceID join Travel_Agency on Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID = Travel_Agency.AgencyID   GROUP BY Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Travel_Agency)

queries.question: List the description and price for services available at each travel agency.
queries.sql: SELECT Service.Description, Service.Price  from Travel_Agency_Service join Service on Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID = Service.ServiceID join Travel_Agency on Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID = Travel_Agency.AgencyID   GROUP BY Travel_Agency_Service.ServiceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Travel_Agency_Service.AgencyID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Travel_Agency)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the service prices for each travel agency.
List the description and price for services available at each travel agency.
Show me the services that every travel agent has.
